@PedroGuiti x Even with your first few users, most solo founders stop growing. The real unlock is turning them into your distribution. Here is something you can do: After they get value, ask: “Who else struggles with this?” or “If this helped, would you share with one friend?” Collect and feature their quick success stories. Happy users telling others beats every other channel for a solo founder.

It's been hard.
